positive: Minimalist geometric arrangement of abstract fauna and flora, featuring stylized constellations and celestial bodies. A group of interconnected, flowing line-art animal silhouettes (e.g., deer, foxes, owls, stags) intertwined with simplified, highly decorative botanical elements (e.g., mandalas, crystalline leaves, moonflowers). The style should be modern, ethereal, and highly graphic, executed in a solid black line-art style against a clean, off-white background. Utilize strong negative space and high contrast. Central composition, suitable for a repeating pattern or single apparel graphic. Inspired by Nordic folk art and Art Deco geometry. Clean lines, sharp edges, high resolution, ink drawing, vector quality, poster art.
